content: Just as human language learners use lexical and conceptual reflection (from the high school English learning framing of Reflexion) to refine their grasp of nuanced word usage, autonomous AI agents can interleave human-style vocabulary-level conceptual reflection into their Self-Refine iterative improvement pipelines to reduce hallucinated terminology and align output with grounded domain meanings. This creates a two-layer reflection framework where conceptual lexical grounding primes more effective self-correction of reasoning.
